characters.appearance: Young adult female, slim build, fair complexion. Long blonde hair, dark eyebrows, and dark eye makeup.
characters.wardrobe: Black t-shirt with a yellow graphic design.
characters.demeanor: Initially frustrated, then engaged and happy.

characters.appearance: Digital avatar of a young female with red hair.
characters.wardrobe: Not clearly visible, appears to be a light-colored top.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: English बोलना बहुत मुश्किल है।
[Speaking English is very difficult.]
Character B says: What is your English level?
[What is your English level?]
Character A says: मुझे नहीं पता।
[I don't know.]
Character B says: Say "I don't know."
[Say "I don't know."]
Character A says: I don't know.
[I don't know.]
Character B says: Can you speak English?
[Can you speak English?]
Character A says: हाँ, मैं...
[Yes, I...]
Character B says: Please say, "Yes, I can speak."
[Please say, "Yes, I can speak."]
Character A says: Yes, I can speak.
[Yes, I can speak.]
Character B says: How old are you?
[How old are you?]
Character A says: मैं... चौबीस...?
[I... twenty-four...?]
Character B says: Please say, "I am 24 years old."
[Please say, "I am 24 years old."]
Character A says: I am 24 years old.
[I am 24 years old.]
Character A says: मैं रोज़ English practice कैसे कर सकती हूँ?
[How can I practice English every day?]
Character B says: Just download Supernova.
[Just download Supernova.]
Character A says: मैं अभी Supernova download करती हूँ!
[I'll download Supernova right now!]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Establishes the core problem: feeling frustrated with English while doing daily chores.
- Demonstrates the interactive, conversational AI tutor feature of the app.
- Shows immediate progress and confidence building.
- Ends with a clear call to action to download the app.
